# Azure Mastery

> Azure Mastery is an iOS and iPadOS app for Microsoft certification exam preparation (Azure, AI, Data, Security, Power Platform, and GitHub). It uses on-device CoreML to predict your exam score (Exam IQ), build adaptive study plans, and track knowledge decay before exam day. 11,700+ practice questions cover 32 Microsoft certification exams. The app runs 100% offline with no tracking and no data collection.

Publisher: Moonbeam Alpha Ltd
Platform: iOS 18+, iPadOS 18+
Pricing: Free to download, with optional in-app purchases for full per-exam question banks. No subscription required for core study features.
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/azure-mastery/id6760594569

## Primary pages

- [Home — Azure Mastery](https://azuremastery.app/): Product overview, feature list, screenshots, and App Store link. Canonical entry point.
- [Support](https://azuremastery.app/apps/AzureMastery/support.html): User support, contact, and FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](https://azuremastery.app/apps/AzureMastery/privacy.html): Data handling — none collected; everything runs on-device.
- [Terms of Use](https://azuremastery.app/apps/AzureMastery/terms.html): Standard EULA for in-app purchases.

## Per-exam landing pages

Every exam covered by the app has a dedicated landing page describing the exam, the in-app question count, the official Microsoft Learn skills outline, a suggested study plan, and cert-specific FAQs. Question counts are extracted directly from the app's bundled question banks. Each page ships a single `@graph` JSON-LD block linking 6 entities (WebPage, BreadcrumbList, EducationalOccupationalCredential, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, HowTo) for AI/AEO discoverability. The first 5 below are the most heavily-trafficked Azure exams and ship the deepest per-domain breakdowns.

### Azure infrastructure & solutions (7)

- [AZ-900 — Microsoft Azure Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-900/): 302 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: cloud concepts (25–30%), Azure architecture and services (35–40%), Azure management and governance (30–35%). Skills outline updated 14 January 2026.

- [AZ-104 — Microsoft Azure Administrator](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-104/): 612 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier sysadmin cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions. Five domains: identities and governance (20–25%), storage (15–20%), compute (20–25%), virtual networking (15–20%), monitoring (10–15%). Skills outline updated 17 April 2026.

- [AZ-305 — Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-305/): 315 in-app practice questions. Expert-tier solution architect cert (single exam earns the Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert credential). Renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions plus case studies. Four design domains: identity/governance/monitoring (25–30%), data storage (20–25%), business continuity (15–20%), infrastructure (30–35%). Recommended Associate prerequisite: AZ-104. Skills outline updated 17 April 2026.

- [AZ-204 — Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-204/): 318 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier developer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions. **⚠ Exam retires 31 July 2026.** Five developer domains: compute (25–30%), storage (15–20%), security (15–20%), monitor/troubleshoot/optimize (5–10%), connect/consume services (20–25%). Heavy on SDK code samples in C#/Python/JavaScript. Skills outline updated 14 January 2026.

- [AZ-400 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-400/): 463 in-app practice questions (largest single-cert bank). Expert-tier DevOps cert (single exam earns the Microsoft Certified: DevOps Engineer Expert credential). Renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions. Five DevOps domains: process/communications (10–15%), source control (10–15%), build/release pipelines (50–55%), security/compliance (10–15%), instrumentation (5–10%). Required Associate prerequisite: AZ-104 OR AZ-204. Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

- [AZ-500 — Microsoft Azure Security Engineer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-500/): 346 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier security engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates managing identity and access (Entra, conditional access, PIM), securing networking (NSGs, Azure Firewall, Private Link, DDoS), securing compute/storage/databases, and managing security operations (Defender for Cloud, Sentinel, Key Vault). Skills outline updated 22 January 2026.

- [AZ-700 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft Azure Networking Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-700/): 396 in-app practice questions. Specialty-tier network engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing/implementing core networking (VNets, peering, hybrid), private access (Private Link, ExpressRoute, VPN), routing and load balancing (Application Gateway, Load Balancer, Front Door, Traffic Manager), and securing/monitoring networks. Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

### AI, Machine Learning & Copilot Agents (10)

- [AI-900 — Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals (retired)](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-900/): 340 in-app practice questions retained for reference. Microsoft retired AI-900 on 30 June 2026 and replaced it with AI-901; AI-900 can no longer be scheduled.

- [AI-901 — Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-901/): 385 in-app practice questions. Current replacement for retired AI-900; the Fundamentals credential does not expire and local exam pricing varies. 45-min duration, pass score 700/1000. Two assessed areas: identify AI concepts and responsibilities (40–45%); implement AI solutions by using Microsoft Foundry (55–60%). Requires foundational cloud/Azure knowledge and understanding Python examples. English exam updated 15 April 2026.

- [AI-102 — Designing and Implementing a Microsoft Azure AI Solution (retired)](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-102/): 334 in-app practice questions retained for reference. Microsoft retired AI-102 on 30 June 2026; the current role-based Azure AI apps and agents route is AI-103.

- [AI-103 — Developing AI Apps and Agents on Azure](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-103/): 352 in-app practice questions for the Azure AI Apps and Agents Developer Associate credential. 100-min duration, pass score 700/1000. Five domains: plan/manage an Azure AI solution (25–30%), generative and agentic solutions (30–35%), computer vision (10–15%), text analysis (10–15%), and information extraction (10–15%). Requires Python and Microsoft Foundry experience. Skills measured as of 16 April 2026.

- [AI-200 — Microsoft Azure AI Cloud Developer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-200/): 437 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier AI cloud developer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing cloud-native AI applications, embedding LLMs into Azure-hosted apps, integrating with Azure AI Search and storage, and operationalising AI workloads. Skills outline updated March 2026.

- [AI-300 — Microsoft Azure ML Operations Engineer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-300/): 327 in-app practice questions (covers the ML Operations Engineer role). Associate-tier cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates managing the ML lifecycle on Azure ML — model training pipelines, registries, deployment to managed and Kubernetes endpoints, monitoring drift, and responsible-AI evaluation in production. Skills outline updated March 2026.

- [AB-620 — Microsoft AI Agent Builder Associate](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-620/): 347 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier cert focused on designing and building integrated AI solutions in Copilot Studio. Three domains: plan/configure agent solutions (30–35%), integrate/extend agents (40–45%), and test/manage agents (20–25%). Official study guide updated 21 April 2026.

- [AB-731 — Microsoft AI Transformation Leader](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-731/): 352 in-app practice questions. Beginner-tier leadership cert (no-code), does not expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration (65-min seat), 30–40 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: identify the business value of generative AI solutions (35–40%), identify benefits/capabilities of Microsoft's AI apps and services (35–40%), identify an implementation and adoption strategy (20–25%). For business decision-makers, programme leads, and AI champions — not builders. Skills outline 2026.

- [AB-900 — Microsoft 365 Copilot and Agent Administration Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-900/): 358 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 35–45 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: identify core features/objects of Microsoft 365 (30–35%), data protection and governance for M365 and Copilot (35–40%), basic admin tasks for Copilot and agents (25–30%). For IT admins deploying and governing Copilot. Skills outline published May 2026.

- [AB-100 — Microsoft Agentic AI Business Solutions Architect](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-100/): 345 in-app practice questions. Expert-tier architect cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates architecting multi-agent enterprise solutions with the Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility framework, Microsoft Agent Framework, MCP extensibility, Computer Use, agent feed, and DSPM for AI. Skills outline published May 2026.

### Data (6)

- [DP-900 — Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-900/): 360 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates core data concepts (relational vs non-relational, OLTP vs OLAP), relational data on Azure (Azure SQL family), non-relational data on Azure (Cosmos DB, blob/file/table), and analytics workloads (Synapse, Microsoft Fabric, Power BI fundamentals). Skills outline updated 1 November 2024.

- [DP-100 — Designing and Implementing a Data Science Solution on Azure (retired)](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-100/): 350 in-app practice questions retained for reference. Microsoft retired DP-100 on 1 June 2026; it can no longer be scheduled.

- [DP-300 — Administering Microsoft Azure SQL Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-300/): 384 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier database administrator cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Five domains: plan/implement data platform resources (15–20%), implement secure environment (20–25%), monitor/configure/optimize (20–25%), automation (15–20%), HA/DR (20–25%). Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

- [DP-700 — Implementing Data Engineering Solutions Using Microsoft Fabric](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-700/): 368 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier Microsoft Fabric data engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains each weighted 30–35%: implement and manage an analytics solution (Fabric workspaces, Git and deployment pipelines, OneLake security, orchestration), ingest and transform data (full/incremental loads, Dataflows Gen2, notebooks, PySpark, T-SQL, KQL, OneLake shortcuts, mirroring, Eventstream and Spark Structured Streaming), and monitor and optimize an analytics solution (alerts, error resolution, Lakehouse/Warehouse/Spark tuning). Requires SQL, PySpark, or KQL. Skills outline updated 21 July 2026.

- [DP-750 — Implementing Data Engineering Solutions Using Azure Databricks](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-750/): 408 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier Azure Databricks data engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Four domains: set up and configure an Azure Databricks environment (15–20%), secure and govern Unity Catalog objects (15–20%), prepare and process data (30–35%), deploy and maintain data pipelines and workloads (30–35%). Covers compute selection, Unity Catalog objects and governance (grants, row/column security, ABAC, lineage, Delta Sharing), Delta modelling and Lakeflow/Auto Loader ingestion, Spark optimisation (OPTIMIZE, VACUUM), and CI/CD with Databricks Asset Bundles. Requires SQL and Python. Skills outline updated 11 March 2026.

- [DP-800 — Microsoft Certified: SQL AI Developer Associate](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-800/): 364 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier SQL developer cert focused on AI-enabled SQL workloads (exam title: "Developing AI-Enabled Database Solutions"), renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration (120-min seat), 40–60 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: design and develop database solutions (35–40%) — advanced T-SQL, JSON, regex, fuzzy matching, graph queries, AI-assisted dev; secure/optimize/deploy (35–40%); implement AI capabilities in database solutions (25–30%) — embeddings, vector indexes, RAG with `sp_invoke_external_rest_endpoint`. Skills outline published 12 March 2026.

### Security, Compliance & Identity (4)

- [SC-900 — Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-900/): 324 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates security, compliance, and identity concepts; Microsoft Entra ID capabilities; Microsoft Defender XDR security solutions; and Microsoft Purview compliance solutions. Skills outline updated 7 November 2025.

- [SC-100 — Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect Expert](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-100/): 348 in-app practice questions. Expert-tier cybersecurity architect cert (single exam earns the credential, with prerequisite Associate cert). Renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 120-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing Zero Trust strategy and architecture, evaluating governance/risk/compliance technical strategies, designing security for infrastructure, and designing security for data and applications. Skills outline updated 27 April 2026.

- [SC-200 — Microsoft Security Operations Analyst](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-200/): 351 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier SOC analyst cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates mitigating threats with Microsoft Defender XDR (Defender for Endpoint, Office 365, Identity, Cloud Apps), mitigating threats with Microsoft Sentinel (KQL, analytics rules, watchlists, hunting), and managing security operations across the Microsoft security stack. Skills outline updated 16 April 2026.

- [SC-300 — Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-300/): 350 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier identity admin cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates implementing identities in Microsoft Entra ID, implementing authentication and access management (conditional access, MFA, PIM, passwordless), implementing access management for apps, and planning/implementing identity governance. Skills outline updated 27 April 2026.
- [SC-500 — Microsoft Cloud and AI Security Engineer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-500/): 361 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier cloud and AI security engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. The successor to AZ-500 (which retires 31 August 2026); beta from May 2026, exam expected July 2026. Validates managing identity, access, and governance (Entra ID, PIM, Key Vault, Azure Policy, RBAC); securing storage, databases, and networking (Defender for Storage, Azure SQL, NSGs, Azure Firewall, Private Link); securing compute and AI workloads (Defender for Servers/Containers, plus securing AI — Entra Agent ID, Defender for AI, AI Gateway for Foundry, Purview DSPM for Copilot); and managing and monitoring security posture (Defender for Cloud, Microsoft Sentinel, Security Copilot). Skills outline published May 2026.

### Power Platform (1)

- [PL-300 — Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst](https://azuremastery.app/exams/pl-300/): 358 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier data analyst cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates preparing data (Power Query M, data profiling), modelling data (star schemas, DAX measures, calculation groups, row-level security), visualising and analysing data (Power BI reports, dashboards, AI visuals), and deploying/maintaining assets (workspaces, deployment pipelines, refresh, sensitivity labels). Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.
- [PL-900 — Microsoft Power Platform Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/pl-900/): 351 in-app practice questions. Fundamentals-tier low-code cert, never expires, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates the business value of Power Platform, managing the environment (Dataverse, security model, ALM pipelines), Power Apps (canvas, model-driven and code apps, plus AI-built apps), Power Automate (cloud and desktop flows), and building agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio (topics, knowledge sources, MCP tools, channels). Skills outline updated 24 July 2026.

### GitHub (2)
- [GH-300 — GitHub Copilot](https://azuremastery.app/exams/gh-300/): 355 in-app practice questions. Intermediate GitHub certification covering responsible AI use, Copilot features (IDE, Copilot CLI, Agent Mode, Edit Mode, MCP, Copilot Chat, code review, org-wide policies), Copilot data and architecture, prompt engineering and context crafting, developer productivity, and privacy, content exclusions, and safeguards.
- [GH-900 — GitHub Foundations](https://azuremastery.app/exams/gh-900/): 367 in-app practice questions. Beginner-tier GitHub certification covering Git and GitHub basics, working with repositories, collaboration (issues, pull requests, discussions), modern development practices (GitHub Actions, Codespaces, Copilot), project management, privacy/security/administration, and the GitHub community.

## Exams covered (32)

The app covers the following Microsoft certification exams. All are taught with the same Exam IQ, adaptive study plan, exam simulator, and knowledge-decay engine.

### Azure infrastructure & solutions (7)
- AZ-900 — Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
- AZ-104 — Microsoft Azure Administrator Associate
- AZ-204 — Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure (Developer Associate)
- AZ-305 — Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions (Solutions Architect Expert)
- AZ-400 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions (DevOps Engineer Expert)
- AZ-500 — Microsoft Azure Security Technologies (Security Engineer Associate)
- AZ-700 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft Azure Networking Solutions

### AI, Machine Learning & Copilot Agents (10)
- AI-900 — Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals (retired 30 June 2026; replaced by AI-901)
- AI-901 — Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals
- AI-102 — Designing and Implementing a Microsoft Azure AI Solution (retired 30 June 2026; current route is AI-103)
- AI-103 — Developing AI Apps and Agents on Azure
- AI-200 — Microsoft Azure AI Cloud Developer
- AI-300 — Microsoft Azure ML Operations Engineer
- AB-620 — Microsoft AI Agent Builder Associate
- AB-731 — Microsoft AI Transformation Leader (no-code business leadership)
- AB-900 — Microsoft 365 Copilot and Agent Administration Fundamentals
- AB-100 — Microsoft Agentic AI Business Solutions Architect (Expert)

### Data (6)
- DP-900 — Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals
- DP-100 — Designing and Implementing a Data Science Solution on Azure (retired 1 June 2026)
- DP-300 — Administering Microsoft Azure SQL Solutions (Database Administrator Associate)
- DP-700 — Implementing Data Engineering Solutions Using Microsoft Fabric (Fabric Data Engineer Associate)
- DP-750 — Implementing Data Engineering Solutions Using Azure Databricks (Azure Databricks Data Engineer Associate)
- DP-800 — Developing AI-Enabled Database Solutions (SQL AI Developer Associate)

### Security, Compliance & Identity (4)
- SC-900 — Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals
- SC-100 — Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect Expert
- SC-200 — Microsoft Security Operations Analyst
- SC-300 — Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator
- SC-500 — Implementing End-to-End Security Controls for Cloud and AI Workloads (Cloud and AI Security Engineer Associate)

### Power Platform (1)
- PL-300 — Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate
- PL-900 — Microsoft Power Platform Fundamentals

### GitHub (2)
- GH-300 — GitHub Copilot
- GH-900 — GitHub Foundations

## Core capabilities

- **Exam IQ**: On-device CoreML model that predicts your exam-day score with confidence intervals, using Item Response Theory (IRT) and Bayesian inference over your answer history.
- **Adaptive study plans**: The app picks your next session — weak-spot drills, knowledge-decay refreshes, mock exams — based on your current ability estimate per domain.
- **Aura first-week guidance**: Aura adapts the learner's next step throughout the first week and closes every study block with a concise, evidence-led recap.
- **Exam simulator**: Full-length mock exams under real timing and question distribution for each Microsoft exam.
- **Knowledge decay tracking**: Spaced-repetition signals flag topics where your retention has dropped before exam day, with targeted refresher sessions.
- **Question types**: Multiple choice, multi-select, drag-and-drop ordering, hotspot, case studies — matching the formats Microsoft uses on the real exams.
- **Answer Coach**: For incorrect answers, authored certification guidance explains the misconception, key distinction, and rule to remember. On supported devices, an optional on-device model may rewrite the note only when it passes grounding checks.
- **Offline-first**: Works fully without a network. No telemetry, no analytics on user behavior, no account required.
- **Apple ecosystem**: Native SwiftUI on iPhone and iPad; Live Activities for active study sessions; Apple Watch glance for streaks and XP.

## Differentiation

Azure Mastery is built for serious certification candidates who want to know *when they're ready* rather than just drilling questions. It is differentiated from generic flashcard apps by:

1. ML score prediction calibrated to Microsoft's pass thresholds, not a raw % correct.
2. Per-domain ability estimation — you see exactly which of an exam's domains is dragging your predicted score down.
3. Knowledge decay alerts so you don't lose old material while learning new domains.
4. Privacy-first computation — Exam IQ, Answer Coach, and study-plan generation run on-device; optional sync uses the learner's private iCloud account.

## Social

- [TikTok — @azuremastery](https://www.tiktok.com/@azuremastery): Short-form video tips and exam study walkthroughs.
- [Facebook — Azure Mastery](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61578421530035): App announcements and community.
